concerns: CSS import strategy mismatch: step 3 places CSS in src/modules/shadow-profile/ but step 4 imports it via src/styles/global.css. Module-specific CSS should be imported from the module TS file (like permission-debt does `import './permission-debt.css'`), not via global.css. Only shared UI-component CSS (src/styles/) goes in global.css.

Step 2 is missing a file path for the card list component. The osint-card pattern colocates createOsintCard and createOsintCardList in the same src/ui/osint-card.ts file — the plan should specify that createShadowProfileCardList goes in src/ui/shadow-profile-card.ts alongside createShadowProfileCard.

renderShadowProfileModule must be declared async (returning Promise<HTMLElement>) since it calls the async checkPermissions(). The plan should state this explicitly and note that main.ts must await it, matching the renderPermissionDebtModule pattern.
